{| class="wikitable" |+{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{template|{{{mode}}}}}}}}|citation|Citation |Cite {{{template|{{{mode}}}}}}}} comparison{{#if:{{{header|}}}| {{{header}}}}} ! scope="row" | Wikitext | {{#invoke:Template wrapper|list|_template={{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{template|{{{mode}}}}}}}}|citation|citation |cite {{{template|{{{mode}}}}}}}}|_exclude=old, {{#if:{{{template|}}}||mode,}} template, comment,nosandbox,header}} {{#ifeq:{{{old|}}}|yes| {{!}}- ! scope="row" {{!}} Old {{!}} <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite {{{template|{{{mode}}}}}}/old|_exclude={{#if:{{{template|}}}||mode,}} template, comment,nosandbox,header,old }}</includeonly>}} |- ! scope="row" | Live | <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite {{{template|{{{mode}}}}}}|_exclude={{#if:{{{template|}}}||mode,}} template, comment,nosandbox,header,old }}</includeonly>{{#if:{{{nosandbox|}}}||<nowiki/> {{!}}- ! scope="row" {{!}} Sandbox {{!}} class="cs1-sandbox" {{!}} <includeonly>{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite {{{template|{{{mode}}}}}}/new|_exclude={{#if:{{{template|}}}||mode,}} template, comment,nosandbox,header,old }}</includeonly>}}{{#if:{{{comment|}}}|<nowiki/> {{!}}- {{!}} colspan="2" {{!}} {{{comment}}}}} |}<noinclude>
{{documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here --> </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]
}}</noinclude> \n</noinclude>
